docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-16-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VADO, FLOR
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL LAU. FILED BY MARIANS VADO, FLOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,134.89 FILED BY MARIANS AS TO DEFENDANT VADO, FLOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL L. LAU. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. LAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIANS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VADO, FLOR $1,089.89 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,119.89, PER A STIPULATED JUDGEMENT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ACCRUING INTEREST. PAYMENTS VIA 2 PAYMENTS BEGINNING 7/27/12 AND ON 12TH & 27TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $40.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JUL-27-2012 AND ON THE 12TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
